title: PLUGIN_RECEIPT_V1
description: Receipt emitted by a plugin after execution. Binds plugin execution to deterministic inputs/outputs. All tools become non-authoritative: only receipt-bound outputs are admissible. NO RECEIPT = NO CLAIM.

schema.description: Schema version discriminator. MUST be exactly 'PLUGIN_RECEIPT_V1'.

plugin_id.description: Plugin identifier from registries/plugins_allowlist.json. MUST be registered.

plugin_version.description: Semantic version of the plugin. Must match allowlist version.

execution_id.description: Unique execution identifier. Deterministic (e.g., SHA256 of inputs).

ledger_path.description: Path to the NDJSON ledger file processed by this plugin.

ledger_hash_hex.description: SHA256 of the ledger file at execution time (for reproducibility).

ledger_cum_hash_hex.description: Final cum_hash of the ledger at execution time.

ledger_event_count.description: Number of events in ledger at execution time.

inputs.description: Normalized inputs to the plugin execution.

events_validated.description: Number of ledger events successfully validated.

seq.description: Sequence number of the offending event.

violations.description: List of violations found. Empty on PASS.

output_hash_hex.description: SHA256 of the full output (for binding).

reason_codes.description: Reason codes for this execution result. MUST be lexicographically sorted.

receipt_hash_hex.description: SHA256(Canon(this receipt object)) — self-referential hash for binding.

result.description: Final summary of execution result for consumption by the acceptance gate.
